prompt: Refine VVRP SOCK API to Linux-style unified socket functions
note: Changed SOCK public API to one Linux/BSD-style function family: socket, bind, connect, send, sendto, close. IPv4 remains the only implemented domain internally; IPv6 is represented by AF_INET6 but returns unsupported until implemented. Removed public IPv4-specific socket entry points.
decisions: Expose one socket API family instead of IPv4/IPv6-specific functions
Implement AF_INET/raw IPv4 first and leave AF_INET6 unsupported for now
Do not add AF_PACKET or Ethernet-frame socket capability yet
